items.title: Federal judge rules on whether Buffalo Wild Wings can keep 'boneless wings' on menu
items.description: Federal judge dismisses Buffalo Wild Wings "boneless wings" lawsuit with pun-filled ruling, saying no reasonable consumer expects deboned wing meat.
